title: The Swift Scout
identity: A proud Bandle Scout, Teemo never misses an opportunity to earn a merit badge. Armed with his trusty scout utensils, this yordle is a deceptive ranged fighter with a knapsack full of tricks.
playstyle: Trap. A proud Bandle Scout, Teemo never misses an opportunity to earn a merit badge. Armed with his trusty scout utensils, this yordle is a deceptive ranged fighter with a knapsack full of tricks.
strengths: Setplay and nuisance control through traps and projectiles.
Can cover partner movement and make approaches less predictable.
Current vault observations already show utility with Ahri pressure.
weaknesses: Needs review for consistency under pressure.
Team value can depend on whether the partner capitalizes on trap coverage.
